passives.name: Lightshield Strike
passives.effects: Your next basic attack against a champion is empowered to {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} for{{ft|{{as|{{critical damage|60|80}}|critical damage}} '''bonus''' damage|{{sti|{{as|80% '''total''' critical damage}}}}}}and {{tip|heal}} you for {{as|{{rd|100%|50%}} '''base''' AD}} {{as|(+ 6% of your '''missing''' health)}} (10 second cooldown per target). Excess healing beyond {{as|'''maximum''' health}} is converted to {{as|'''bonus''' health}} for 8 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Your next basic attack against a champion critically strikes for bonus damage and heals you (10s cooldown per target).
Excess healing beyond max health becomes bonus health for 8 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Critical damage bonus differs for melee vs ranged (60% vs 80%).
Heal scales with base AD (melee 100% / ranged 50%) plus 6% missing health.
Sundered Sky is modeled as a per-target short-trade burst and sustain effect: first champion hit crit and heal, then temporary overheal conversion.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Sundered Sky
sources.used_for: page-level verification of per-target cooldown, critical strike bonus damage, and overheal conversion behavior
